## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Sunbit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, traffic updates, and address technical issues.](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Traffic trend shows a slowdown in decline; shop directory views increased slightly](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [Major traffic-driving articles (e.g., clear aligner cost) are 404ing due to URL structure changes](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [New B2B content clusters for auto and dental merchant adoption are being developed](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [GrowthX to start sending articles through webhook for Claude-assisted summarization](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline and Delivery

  - [Kyle (absent) out sick; Ehtisham covering report](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [Dev team working on automating focus keywords, cluster, summary, and key takeaways (ETA: 2 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Immediate plan: Send 5 articles via webhook, monitor, bug-bash, then scale up to 10, then full batch](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Jason to use Claude for summaries and key points extraction](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)

### Traffic and Analytics Update

  - [Sessions and active users continued downward trend (390 → 354 → 363 → 324)](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Shop directory views increased slightly (55 → 57)](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Average engagement time saw a slight uptick](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Major traffic winner (clear aligner cost article) now 404ing](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)

### Technical Issues

  - [Multiple high-traffic articles (including dental tips) returning 404 errors](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Likely cause: Blog template update affecting older posts' URL structures](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Action: Team to review and fix URLs for posts from June-August, pre-dating new blog layout (mid-August)](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [Angel suggested using a path checker tool for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)

### New B2B Content Strategy

  - [2 new clusters: auto merchant adoption and dental clinic adoption](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [Article structure: Address industry challenges → Present statistics → Discuss financing benefits → Introduce Sunbit](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Use case studies and third-party sources to build credibility](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
  - [CTA: "Become a Sunbit partner"](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Feedback process: Leave comments in Word doc, tag Ehtisham](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)

### Content Mix and Publication

  - [Will intersperse new B2B cluster content (5-10 articles/week) with existing auto part and dental cost topics](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
  - [Ready-to-publish articles to be sent via webhook](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ehtisham to send 5 articles via webhook for initial testing](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Jason to monitor webhook process, conduct bug-bashing, and signal for scaling up](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Team to review and provide feedback on new B2B content directly in Word docs](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [Jason to investigate and fix URL issues for older blog posts (June-August)](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Consider implementing a path checker tool for efficient URL verification](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [Continue developing and integrating new B2B content alongside existing topics](https://fathom.video/share/pYcEcH8Yg1os8s6Uy9u3HsyK7Kp8myGr?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
